description:
The best all-in-one screen recorder and video editor. Record your screen, add video effects, transitions and more.

Camtasia is a video-based screen capture program that enables users to demonstrate and communicate ideas or share knowledge using video. From quick video demos to extensive video projects, Camtasia has a wide range of editing tools to create video content from a variety of sources. Users can record from webcam or screen, introduce a variety of effects, and easily share videos over multiple channels.
Updates for IT Administrators
- Update zlib to version 1.3.2.
- Update harfbuzz to version 13.0.1.
- Update libpng16 to 1.6.55.
Bug Fixes
- Fixed a bug where the audio level line does not show on media until an audio point is added.
- Fixed a potential recorder startup crash affecting some usernames that contained multibyte characters.
- Fixed potential startup crash when checking for access token expiration before token was fully initialized.
- Fixed a potential startup crash if user has a license tied to their account and an error caused them to be signed out.
- Fix the bug that background doesn't resize when first changing from Horizontal to Vertical using the Layouts tab.
- Added "Nirmala UI" as a fallback font to better support South Asian languages.
